features.name: force on register with clocked assignment
features.description: Code should include a force statement targeting a register that is driven by a clocked always block assignment

features.name: force on output port driven by wire assignment
features.description: Code should include a force statement targeting an output port that is driven by a continuous wire assignment

features.name: concurrent forces on register and its derived output
features.description: Code should include force statements applied simultaneously to both a register and an output port where the output is driven by the register through wire assignment
